title: Clinical Intern
bio: Sumaira Mukhles is a Clinical Intern at Riaz Counseling, supporting clients experiencing anxiety, depression, stress, grief, relationship concerns, life transitions, infidelity, and career-related challenges. Sumaira’s primary areas of focus include anxiety, coping skills, and navigating life transitions, while also working with individuals experiencing mood disorders. Sumaira provides individual, couples, family, and group therapy services for children (6–10), preteens (11–12), teens (13–19), and adults (20–64). Drawing from evidence-based and client-centered approaches including Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT), Emotionally Focused Therapy, Humanistic Therapy, Integrative Therapy, Person-Centered Therapy, Play Therapy, Solution-Focused Brief Therapy (SFBT), Somatic Therapy, Trauma-Focused Therapy, and Coaching, Sumaira creates a culturally sensitive and supportive environment that encourages healing and personal growth.
